title: Elon Musk Just Shocked OpenAI With Grok 5
summary: Elon Musk's xAI has reportedly completed training of a 1.5 trillion-parameter Grok 5 model trained on developer workflow data. xAI is launching Grok Build, a coding agent with terminal-based AI programming capabilities and parallel subagent workflows aimed at competing with OpenAI, Google, and Anthropic in the AI coding space.
